public class Solution { public int jump(int[] nums) { return computeJump(nums, 0, 0); } private int computeJump(int[] nums, int jumps, int currentEnd) { int currentFarthest = 0; for (int i = 0; i < nums.length - 1 && i <= currentEnd; i++) { currentFarthest = Math.max(currentFarthest, i + nums[i]); if (i == currentEnd) { jumps++; currentEnd = currentFarthest; } } return jumps; } }

public class Solution { public boolean canJump(int[] nums) { return computeCanJump(nums, 0); } private boolean computeCanJump(int[] nums, int index) { if (index >= nums.length - 1) return true; for (int i = index; i < Math.min(index + nums[index], nums.length); ++i) { if (computeCanJump(nums, i)) return true; } return false; } }

public class Solution { public int uniquePathsWithObstacles(int[][] grid) { int m = grid.length; int n = grid[0].length; if (grid[0][0] == 1 || grid[m - 1][n - 1] == 1) return 0; for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j) { if (grid[i][j] == 1) continue; if (i > 0 || j > 0) grid[i][j] += (i > 0 ? grid[i - 1][j] : 0) + (j > 0 ? grid[i][j - 1] : 0); } return grid[m - 1][n - 1]; } }

public class Solution { public int mySqrt(int x) { boolean isMatch = (x == 0 || x == 1); if (isMatch) return x; int start = 1, end = x, ans = 0; while (start <= end) { int mid = (start + end) / 2; if (mid * mid == x) return mid; if (mid <= x / mid) { start = mid + 1; ans = mid; } else { end = mid - 1; } } return ans; } }

public class Solution { public int minDistance(String word1, String word2) { int rowCount = word1.length(); int colCount = word2.length(); int[][] dpTable = new int[rowCount + 1][colCount + 1]; for (int i = 0; i <= rowCount; i++) { for (int j = 0; j <= colCount; j++) { if (i == 0) { dpTable[i][j] = j; } else if (j == 0) { dpTable[i][j] = i; } else if (word1.charAt(i - 1) == word2.charAt(j - 1)) { dpTable[i][j] = dpTable[i - 1][j - 1]; } else { dpTable[i][j] = Math.min(Math.min(dpTable[i - 1][j], dpTable[i][j - 1]), dpTable[i - 1][j - 1]) + 1; } } } return dpTable[rowCount][colCount]; } }

public class Solution { public void setZeroes(int[][] matrix) { int rows = matrix.length; int cols = matrix[0].length; if (rows == 0 || cols == 0) return; boolean firstRowHasZero = false, firstColHasZero = false; for (int i = 0; i < rows; i++) { if (matrix[i][0] == 0) { firstColHasZero = true; break; } } for (int j = 0; j < cols; j++) { if (matrix[0][j] == 0) { firstRowHasZero = true; break; } } for (int i = 1; i < rows; i++) { for (int j = 1; j < cols; j++) { if (matrix[i][j] == 0) { matrix[0][i] = 0; matrix[j][0] = 0; } } } for (int i = 1; i < rows; i++) { for (int j = 1; j < cols; j++) { if (matrix[i][0] == 0 || matrix[0][j] == 0) { matrix[i][j] = 0; } } } if (firstRowHasZero) { Arrays.fill(matrix[0], 0); } if (firstColHasZero) { for (int i = 1; i < rows; i++) { matrix[i][0] = 0; } } } }

public class Solution { public void sortColors(int[] nums) { int red = 0, white = 0, blue = nums.length - 1; while (white <= blue) { int currentColor = nums[white]; if (currentColor == 0) { int temp = nums[red]; nums[red++] = currentColor; nums[white++] = temp; } else if (currentColor == 1) { white++; } else { int temp = nums[white]; nums[white] = nums[blue]; nums[blue--] = temp; } } } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List> combine(int n, int k) { List> result = new ArrayList<>(); if (current.size() == k) { result.add(new ArrayList<>(current)); return; } for (int i = start; i <= n; i++) { current.add(i); List> tempResult = new ArrayList<>(); backtrack(n, k, i + 1, current, tempResult); result.addAll(tempResult); current.remove(current.size() - 1); } return result; } }

public class Solution { public boolean search(int[] nums, int target) { if (nums.length == 0) return false; int left = 0, right = nums.length - 1; while (left <= right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (nums[mid] == target) return true; if (nums[left] == nums[mid]) { left++; continue; } if (nums[mid] > nums[left]) { if (!(nums[left] <= target && target < nums[mid])) { left = mid + 1; continue; } } else { if (!(nums[mid] < target && target <= nums[right])) { right = mid - 1; continue; } } return false; // This line should never be reached } return false; } }

public class Solution { public boolean isScramble(String s1, String s2) { if (s1.equals(s2)) return true; char[] chars = s1.toCharArray(); Arrays.sort(chars); String sortedS1 = new String(chars); chars = s2.toCharArray(); Arrays.sort(chars); String sortedS2 = new String(chars); if (!sortedS1.equals(sortedS2)) return false; for (int i = 1; i < s1.length(); i++) { if (isScramble(s1.substring(0, i), s2.substring(0, i)) && isScramble(s1.substring(i), s2.substring(i))) return true; if (isScramble(s1.substring(0, i), s2.substring(s2.length() - i)) && isScramble(s1.substring(i), s2.substring(0, s2.length() - i))) return true; } return false; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List grayCode(int n) { return computeGrayCode(n); } private List computeGrayCode(int n) { List result = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < (1 << n); i++) { result.add(i ^ (i >> 1)); } return result; } }

public class Solution { public boolean isInterleave(String s1, String s2, String s3) { int m = s1.length(), n = s2.length(); if (m + n != s3.length()) return false; boolean[][] dp = new boolean[m + 1][n + 1]; dp[0][0] = true; for (int i = 0; i <= m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j <= n; j++) { if (i == 0 && j == 0) continue; boolean fromTop = i > 0 ? dp[i - 1][j] && s1.charAt(i - 1) == s3.charAt(i + j - 1) : false; boolean fromLeft = j > 0 ? dp[i][j - 1] && s2.charAt(j - 1) == s3.charAt(i + j - 1) : false; dp[i][j] = fromTop || fromLeft; } } return dp[m][n]; } }

public class Solution { void inorder(TreeNode node, TreeNode[] nodes) { if (node == null) return; inorder(node.left, nodes); if (nodes[1] != null && nodes[1].val > node.val) { if (nodes[0] == null) nodes[0] = nodes[1]; nodes[2] = node; } nodes[1] = node; inorder(node.right, nodes); } public void recoverTree(TreeNode root) { TreeNode[] nodes = new TreeNode[3]; inorder(root, nodes); if (nodes[0] == null || nodes[2] == null) return; int temp = nodes[0].val; nodes[0].val = nodes[2].val; nodes[2].val = temp; } }

public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; } public class Solution { public boolean isSameTree(TreeNode p, TreeNode q) { boolean isMatch = (p == null && q == null); if (isMatch) { return true; } if (p == null || q == null) { return false; } if (p.val != q.val) { return false; } return isSameTree(p.left, q.left) && isSameTree(p.right, q.right); } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.List; import java.util.Queue; public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x) { val = x; } } public class Solution { public List> levelOrderBottom(TreeNode root) { List> result = new ArrayList<>(); if (root == null) return result; Queue queue = new LinkedList<>(); queue.add(root); while (!queue.isEmpty()) { int size = queue.size(); List currentLevel = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) { TreeNode node = queue.poll(); currentLevel.add(node.val); if (node.left != null) queue.add(node.left); if (node.right != null) queue.add(node.right); } result.add(0, currentLevel); // Add the level to the front } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int minDepth(TreeNode root) { if (root == null) return 0; return computeMinDepth(root); } private int computeMinDepth(TreeNode node) { if (node == null) return 0; int left = computeMinDepth(node.left); int right = computeMinDepth(node.right); return (left == 0 || right == 0) ? left + right + 1 : Math.min(left, right) + 1; } }

public class Solution { public int maxProfit(int[] prices) { return computeMaxProfit(prices); } private int computeMaxProfit(int[] prices) { int max_profit = 0; for (int i = 1; i < prices.length; i++) { if (prices[i] > prices[i - 1]) { max_profit += prices[i] - prices[i - 1]; } } return max_profit; } }

import java.util.*; public class Solution { public List> findLadders(String beginWord, String endWord, List wordList) { Set dict = new HashSet<>(wordList); if (!dict.contains(endWord)) { return Collections.emptyList(); } Map> adjacent = new HashMap<>(); Map distance = new HashMap<>(); Queue queue = new LinkedList<>(); queue.offer(beginWord); distance.put(beginWord, 0); while (!queue.isEmpty()) { String current = queue.poll(); if (current.equals(endWord)) { break; } for (String neighbor : neighbors(current)) { if (!dict.contains(neighbor) || distance.containsKey(neighbor)) { continue; } distance.put(neighbor, distance.get(current) + 1); adjacent.computeIfAbsent(current, k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(neighbor); queue.offer(neighbor); } } List> result = new ArrayList<>(); List path = new ArrayList<>(); path.add(beginWord); backtrack(beginWord, endWord, path, adjacent, result); return result; } private void backtrack(String current, String endWord, List path, Map> adjacent, List> result) { if (current.equals(endWord)) { result.add(new ArrayList<>(path)); return; } for (String next : adjacent.getOrDefault(current, Collections.emptyList())) { path.add(next); backtrack(next, endWord, path, adjacent, result); path.remove(path.size() - 1); } } private List neighbors(String word) { List result = new ArrayList<>(); char[] chars = word.toCharArray(); for (int i = 0; i < chars.length; i++) { char original = chars[i]; for (char j = 'a'; j <= 'z'; j++) { if (j == original) { continue; } chars[i] = j; result.add(new String(chars)); } chars[i] = original; } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int minCut(String s) { int n = s.length(); int[] dp = new int[n + 1]; boolean[][] isPalindrome = new boolean[n][n]; for (int i=0; i <= n; i++) { dp[i] = i - 1; } for (int j=1; j < n; j++) { for (int i=j; i >= 0; i--) { boolean isMatch = s.charAt(i) == s.charAt(j) && (j - i < 2 || isPalindrome[i + 1][j - 1]); if (isMatch) { isPalindrome[i][j] = true; dp[j + 1] = Math.min(dp[j + 1], dp[i] + 1); } } } return dp[n]; } }

public class ListNode { int val; ListNode next; } public class Solution { public public ListNode detectCycle(ListNode head) { ListNode slow = head, fast = head; boolean isMatch = (fast != null && fast.next != null); while (isMatch) { slow = slow.next; fast = fast.next.next; if (slow == fast) { ListNode start = head; while (start != slow) { start = start.next; slow = slow.next; } return start; } isMatch = (fast != null && fast.next != null); } return null; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; import java.util.Stack; public class TreeNode { int value; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x) { value = x; } } public class Solution { public List postorderTraversal(TreeNode root) { List result = new ArrayList<>(); Stack s = new Stack<>(); if (root == null) return result; s.push(root); while (!s.isEmpty()) { TreeNode current = s.pop(); result.add(0, current.value); if (current.left != null) s.push(current.left); if (current.right != null) s.push(current.right); } return result; } }

class ListNode { int val; ListNode next; } public class Solution { public ListNode insertionSortList(ListNode head) { ListNode dummy = new ListNode(0); ListNode cur; while (head != null) { // Find the correct position to insert 'head' findInsertionPosition(dummy, head); // Move to the next node head = head.next; } return dummy.next; } private void findInsertionPosition(ListNode dummy, ListNode target) { ListNode cur = dummy; while (cur.next != null && cur.next.val < target.val) { cur = cur.next; } // Insert 'target' into the correct position insertNode(cur, target); } private void insertNode(ListNode prev, ListNode nodeToInsert) { ListNode temp = prev.next; prev.next = nodeToInsert; nodeToInsert.next = temp; } }

public class ListNode { int val; ListNode next; ListNode(int x) { val = x; } } public class Solution { public public ListNode sortList(ListNode head) { boolean isMatch = (head == null || head.next == null); if (isMatch) return head; ListNode slow = head, fast = head.next; while (fast != null && fast.next != null) { slow = slow.next; fast = fast.next.next; } ListNode mid = slow.next; slow.next = null; return merge(sortList(head), sortList(mid)); } private ListNode merge(ListNode left, ListNode right) { if (left == null) return right; if (right == null) return left; if (left.val < right.val) { left.next = merge(left.next, right); return left; } else { right.next = merge(left, right.next); return right; } } }

public class Solution { public int maxProduct(int[] nums) { int firstElement = nums[0]; int max_so_far = firstElement; int min_so_far = firstElement; int result = firstElement; for (int i = 1; i < nums.length; i++) { if (nums[i] < 0) { int temp = max_so_far; max_so_far = min_so_far; min_so_far = temp; } max_so_far = Math.max(nums[i], max_so_far * nums[i]); min_so_far = Math.min(nums[i], min_so_far * nums[i]); result = Math.max(result, max_so_far); } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int findMin(int[] nums) { int left = 0, right = nums.length - 1; while (left < right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (nums[left + (right - left) / 2] > nums[right]) { left = mid + 1; } else { right = mid; } } return nums[left]; } }

public class Solution { public int findMin(int[] nums) { int low = 0, high = nums.length - 1; while (low < high) { int mid = low + (high - low) / 2; if (nums[low + (high - low) / 2] > nums[high]) { low = mid + 1; } else if (nums[low + (high - low) / 2] < nums[high]) { high = mid; } else { high--; } } return nums[low]; } }

public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x) { val = x; } } public class Solution { public public TreeNode upsideDownBinaryTree(TreeNode root) { boolean isMatch = (root == null || root.left == null); if (isMatch) { return root; } TreeNode new_root = upsideDownBinaryTree(root.left); root.left.right = root; root.left.left = root.right; root.left = null; root.right = null; return new_root; } }

public class Solution { public boolean isOneEditDistance(String s, String t) { int rowCount = s.length(); int colCount = t.length(); if (rowCount > colCount) { return isOneEditDistance(t, s); } if (colCount - rowCount > 1) { return false; } for (int i = 0; i < rowCount; ++i) { if (s.charAt(i) != t.charAt(i)) { if (rowCount < colCount) { return s.substring(i).equals(t.substring(i + 1)); } else { return s.substring(i + 1).equals(t.substring(i + 1)); } } } return rowCount + 1 == colCount; } }

public class Solution { public int findPeakElement(int[] nums) { int left = 0, right = nums.length - 1; while (left < right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (nums[mid] < nums[left + (right - left) / 2 + 1]) { left = mid + 1; } else { right = mid; } } return left; } }

public class Solution { public int compareVersion(String version1, String version2) { int i = 0, j = 0; boolean isWithinRange = true; while (isWithinRange) { int num1 = 0, num2 = 0; if (i < version1.length() && version1.charAt(i) != '.') { num1 = num1 * 10 + (version1.charAt(i++) - '0'); } if (j < version2.length() && version2.charAt(j) != '.') { num2 = num2 * 10 + (version2.charAt(j++) - '0'); } isWithinRange = i < version1.length() || j < version2.length(); if (num1 < num2) return -1; if (num1 > num2) return 1; } return 0; } }

public class Solution { public int trailingZeroes(int n) { int zeroCount = 0; while (n > 0) { n = n / 5; zeroCount += n; } return zeroCount; } }
public class Solution { public int rob(int[] nums) { return Arrays.stream(nums) .reduce(0, (prev2, num) -> Math.max(prev2 + num, prev1), Integer::max); } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.List; import java.util.Queue; public class Solution { public boolean canFinish(int numCourses, int[][] prerequisites) { List> adj = new ArrayList<>(numCourses); int[] inDegree = new int[numCourses]; for (int i = 0; i < numCourses; i++) adj.add(new ArrayList<>()); // Build the adjacency list and calculate in-degrees for (int[] p : prerequisites) { adj.get(p[1]).add(p[0]); inDegree[p[0]]++; } Queue q = new LinkedList<>(); // Enqueue all nodes with zero in-degree for (int i = 0; i < numCourses; i++) { if (inDegree[i] == 0) q.add(i); } int completedCourses = 0; // Process the queue to reduce in-degrees and enqueue new nodes with zero in-degree while (!q.isEmpty()) { int currCourse = q.poll(); completedCourses++; for (int nextCourse : adj.get(currCourse)) { inDegree[nextCourse]--; if (inDegree[nextCourse] == 0) q.add(nextCourse); } } // Check if all courses are completed return completedCourses == numCourses; } }

public class Solution { public int minSubArrayLen(int target, int[] nums) { return computeMinSubArrayLen(target, nums); } private int computeMinSubArrayLen(int target, int[] nums) { int left = 0, cur_sum = 0, min_len = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int right = 0; right < nums.length; right++) { cur_sum += nums[right]; while (cur_sum >= target) { min_len = Math.min(min_len, right - left + 1); cur_sum -= nums[left++]; } } return min_len == Integer.MAX_VALUE ? 0 : min_len; } }

public class Solution { public boolean containsNearbyDuplicate(int[] nums, int k) { HashMap valueIndexMap = new HashMap<>(); for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { if (valueIndexMap.containsKey(nums[i])) { int lastIndex = valueIndexMap.get(nums[i]); boolean isWithinRange = Math.abs(i - lastIndex) <= k; if (isWithinRange) { return true; } } valueIndexMap.put(nums[i], i); } return false; } }

import java.util.TreeSet; public class Solution { public boolean containsNearbyAlmostDuplicate(int[] nums, int k, int t) { return computeContainsNearbyAlmostDuplicate(nums, k, t); } private boolean computeContainsNearbyAlmostDuplicate(int[] nums, int k, int t) { TreeSet window = new TreeSet<>(); for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { if (i > k) { window.remove((long) nums[i - k - 1]); } Long ceil = window.ceiling((long) nums[i] - t); if (ceil != null && ceil - nums[i] <= t) { return true; } window.add((long) nums[i]); } return false; } }

public class Solution { public int countDigitOne(int n) { return computeCountDigitOne(n, 1); } private int computeCountDigitOne(long n, long i) { if (n < i) return 0; long divider = i * 10; return (int)((n / divider) * i + Math.min(Math.max(n % divider - i + 1, 0), i)) + computeCountDigitOne(n, i * 10); } }

public class Solution { public int shortestDistance(String[] wordsDict, String word1, String word2) { return computeShortestDistance(wordsDict, word1, word2); } private int computeShortestDistance(String[] wordsDict, String word1, String word2) { int idx1 = -1, idx2 = -1, minDistance = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int i = 0; i < wordsDict.length; i++) { if (word1.equals(wordsDict[i])) idx1 = i; if (word2.equals(wordsDict[i])) idx2 = i; if (idx1 != -1 && idx2 != -1) minDistance = Math.min(minDistance, Math.abs(idx1 - idx2)); } return minDistance; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List> getFactors(int n) { List> result = new ArrayList<>(); helper(n, 2, new ArrayList<>(), result); return result; } private void helper(int n, int start, List path, List> result) { if (n == 1 && path.size() > 1) { result.add(new ArrayList<>(path)); return; } for (int i = start; i <= n; i++) { if (n % i != 0) continue; path.add(i); helper(n / i, i, path, result); path.remove(path.size() - 1); } } }

public class Solution { public void setZeroes(int[][] matrix) { int rows = matrix.length; int cols = matrix[0].length; if (rows == 0 || cols == 0) return; boolean firstRowHasZero = false, firstColHasZero = false; for (int i = 0; i < rows; i++) { if (matrix[i][0] == 0) { firstColHasZero = true; break; } } for (int j = 0; j < cols; j++) { if (matrix[0][j] == 0) { firstRowHasZero = true; break; } } for (int i = 1; i < rows; i++) { for (int j = 1; j < cols; j++) { if (matrix[i][j] == 0) { matrix[0][i] = 0; matrix[j][0] = 0; } } } for (int i = 1; i < rows; i++) { for (int j = 1; j < cols; j++) { if (matrix[i][0] == 0 || matrix[0][j] == 0) { matrix[i][j] = 0; } } } if (firstRowHasZero) { Arrays.fill(matrix[0], 0); } if (firstColHasZero) { for (int i = 1; i < rows; i++) { matrix[i][0] = 0; } } } }

public class Solution { public void sortColors(int[] nums) { int red = 0, white = 0, blue = nums.length - 1; while (white <= blue) { int currentColor = nums[white]; if (currentColor == 0) { int temp = nums[red]; nums[red++] = currentColor; nums[white++] = temp; } else if (currentColor == 1) { white++; } else { int temp = nums[white]; nums[white] = nums[blue]; nums[blue--] = temp; } } } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List> combine(int n, int k) { List> result = new ArrayList<>(); if (current.size() == k) { result.add(new ArrayList<>(current)); return; } for (int i = start; i <= n; i++) { current.add(i); List> tempResult = new ArrayList<>(); backtrack(n, k, i + 1, current, tempResult); result.addAll(tempResult); current.remove(current.size() - 1); } return result; } }

public class Solution { public boolean search(int[] nums, int target) { if (nums.length == 0) return false; int left = 0, right = nums.length - 1; while (left <= right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (nums[mid] == target) return true; if (nums[left] == nums[mid]) { left++; continue; } if (nums[mid] > nums[left]) { if (!(nums[left] <= target && target < nums[mid])) { left = mid + 1; continue; } } else { if (!(nums[mid] < target && target <= nums[right])) { right = mid - 1; continue; } } return false; // This line should never be reached } return false; } }

public class Solution { public boolean isScramble(String s1, String s2) { if (s1.equals(s2)) return true; char[] chars = s1.toCharArray(); Arrays.sort(chars); String sortedS1 = new String(chars); chars = s2.toCharArray(); Arrays.sort(chars); String sortedS2 = new String(chars); if (!sortedS1.equals(sortedS2)) return false; for (int i = 1; i < s1.length(); i++) { if (isScramble(s1.substring(0, i), s2.substring(0, i)) && isScramble(s1.substring(i), s2.substring(i))) return true; if (isScramble(s1.substring(0, i), s2.substring(s2.length() - i)) && isScramble(s1.substring(i), s2.substring(0, s2.length() - i))) return true; } return false; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List grayCode(int n) { return computeGrayCode(n); } private List computeGrayCode(int n) { List result = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < (1 << n); i++) { result.add(i ^ (i >> 1)); } return result; } }

public class Solution { public boolean isInterleave(String s1, String s2, String s3) { int m = s1.length(), n = s2.length(); if (m + n != s3.length()) return false; boolean[][] dp = new boolean[m + 1][n + 1]; dp[0][0] = true; for (int i = 0; i <= m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j <= n; j++) { if (i == 0 && j == 0) continue; boolean fromTop = i > 0 ? dp[i - 1][j] && s1.charAt(i - 1) == s3.charAt(i + j - 1) : false; boolean fromLeft = j > 0 ? dp[i][j - 1] && s2.charAt(j - 1) == s3.charAt(i + j - 1) : false; dp[i][j] = fromTop || fromLeft; } } return dp[m][n]; } }

public class Solution { void inorder(TreeNode node, TreeNode[] nodes) { if (node == null) return; inorder(node.left, nodes); if (nodes[1] != null && nodes[1].val > node.val) { if (nodes[0] == null) nodes[0] = nodes[1]; nodes[2] = node; } nodes[1] = node; inorder(node.right, nodes); } public void recoverTree(TreeNode root) { TreeNode[] nodes = new TreeNode[3]; inorder(root, nodes); if (nodes[0] == null || nodes[2] == null) return; int temp = nodes[0].val; nodes[0].val = nodes[2].val; nodes[2].val = temp; } }

public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; } public class Solution { public boolean isSameTree(TreeNode p, TreeNode q) { boolean isMatch = (p == null && q == null); if (isMatch) { return true; } if (p == null || q == null) { return false; } if (p.val != q.val) { return false; } return isSameTree(p.left, q.left) && isSameTree(p.right, q.right); } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.List; import java.util.Queue; public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x) { val = x; } } public class Solution { public List> levelOrderBottom(TreeNode root) { List> result = new ArrayList<>(); if (root == null) return result; Queue queue = new LinkedList<>(); queue.add(root); while (!queue.isEmpty()) { int size = queue.size(); List currentLevel = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) { TreeNode node = queue.poll(); currentLevel.add(node.val); if (node.left != null) queue.add(node.left); if (node.right != null) queue.add(node.right); } result.add(0, currentLevel); // Add the level to the front } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int minDepth(TreeNode root) { if (root == null) return 0; return computeMinDepth(root); } private int computeMinDepth(TreeNode node) { if (node == null) return 0; int left = computeMinDepth(node.left); int right = computeMinDepth(node.right); return (left == 0 || right == 0) ? left + right + 1 : Math.min(left, right) + 1; } }

public class Solution { public int maxProfit(int[] prices) { return computeMaxProfit(prices); } private int computeMaxProfit(int[] prices) { int max_profit = 0; for (int i = 1; i < prices.length; i++) { if (prices[i] > prices[i - 1]) { max_profit += prices[i] - prices[i - 1]; } } return max_profit; } }

import java.util.*; public class Solution { public List> findLadders(String beginWord, String endWord, List wordList) { Set dict = new HashSet<>(wordList); if (!dict.contains(endWord)) { return Collections.emptyList(); } Map> adjacent = new HashMap<>(); Map distance = new HashMap<>(); Queue queue = new LinkedList<>(); queue.offer(beginWord); distance.put(beginWord, 0); while (!queue.isEmpty()) { String current = queue.poll(); if (current.equals(endWord)) { break; } for (String neighbor : neighbors(current)) { if (!dict.contains(neighbor) || distance.containsKey(neighbor)) { continue; } distance.put(neighbor, distance.get(current) + 1); adjacent.computeIfAbsent(current, k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(neighbor); queue.offer(neighbor); } } List> result = new ArrayList<>(); List path = new ArrayList<>(); path.add(beginWord); backtrack(beginWord, endWord, path, adjacent, result); return result; } private void backtrack(String current, String endWord, List path, Map> adjacent, List> result) { if (current.equals(endWord)) { result.add(new ArrayList<>(path)); return; } for (String next : adjacent.getOrDefault(current, Collections.emptyList())) { path.add(next); backtrack(next, endWord, path, adjacent, result); path.remove(path.size() - 1); } } private List neighbors(String word) { List result = new ArrayList<>(); char[] chars = word.toCharArray(); for (int i = 0; i < chars.length; i++) { char original = chars[i]; for (char j = 'a'; j <= 'z'; j++) { if (j == original) { continue; } chars[i] = j; result.add(new String(chars)); } chars[i] = original; } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int minCut(String s) { int n = s.length(); int[] dp = new int[n + 1]; boolean[][] isPalindrome = new boolean[n][n]; for (int i=0; i <= n; i++) { dp[i] = i - 1; } for (int j=1; j < n; j++) { for (int i=j; i >= 0; i--) { boolean isMatch = s.charAt(i) == s.charAt(j) && (j - i < 2 || isPalindrome[i + 1][j - 1]); if (isMatch) { isPalindrome[i][j] = true; dp[j + 1] = Math.min(dp[j + 1], dp[i] + 1); } } } return dp[n]; } }

public class ListNode { int val; ListNode next; } public class Solution { public public ListNode detectCycle(ListNode head) { ListNode slow = head, fast = head; boolean isMatch = (fast != null && fast.next != null); while (isMatch) { slow = slow.next; fast = fast.next.next; if (slow == fast) { ListNode start = head; while (start != slow) { start = start.next; slow = slow.next; } return start; } isMatch = (fast != null && fast.next != null); } return null; } }

class ListNode { int val; ListNode next; } public class Solution { public ListNode insertionSortList(ListNode head) { ListNode dummy = new ListNode(0); ListNode cur; while (head != null) { // Find the correct position to insert 'head' findInsertionPosition(dummy, head); // Move to the next node head = head.next; } return dummy.next; } private void findInsertionPosition(ListNode dummy, ListNode target) { ListNode cur = dummy; while (cur.next != null && cur.next.val < target.val) { cur = cur.next; } // Insert 'target' into the correct position insertNode(cur, target); } private void insertNode(ListNode prev, ListNode nodeToInsert) { ListNode temp = prev.next; prev.next = nodeToInsert; nodeToInsert.next = temp; } }

public class ListNode { int val; ListNode next; ListNode(int x) { val = x; } } public class Solution { public public ListNode sortList(ListNode head) { boolean isMatch = (head == null || head.next == null); if (isMatch) return head; ListNode slow = head, fast = head.next; while (fast != null && fast.next != null) { slow = slow.next; fast = fast.next.next; } ListNode mid = slow.next; slow.next = null; return merge(sortList(head), sortList(mid)); } private ListNode merge(ListNode left, ListNode right) { if (left == null) return right; if (right == null) return left; if (left.val < right.val) { left.next = merge(left.next, right); return left; } else { right.next = merge(left, right.next); return right; } } }

public class Solution { public int maxProduct(int[] nums) { int firstElement = nums[0]; int max_so_far = firstElement; int min_so_far = firstElement; int result = firstElement; for (int i = 1; i < nums.length; i++) { if (nums[i] < 0) { int temp = max_so_far; max_so_far = min_so_far; min_so_far = temp; } max_so_far = Math.max(nums[i], max_so_far * nums[i]); min_so_far = Math.min(nums[i], min_so_far * nums[i]); result = Math.max(result, max_so_far); } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int findMin(int[] nums) { int left = 0, right = nums.length - 1; while (left < right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (nums[left + (right - left) / 2] > nums[right]) { left = mid + 1; } else { right = mid; } } return nums[left]; } }

public class Solution { public int findMin(int[] nums) { int low = 0, high = nums.length - 1; while (low < high) { int mid = low + (high - low) / 2; if (nums[low + (high - low) / 2] > nums[high]) { low = mid + 1; } else if (nums[low + (high - low) / 2] < nums[high]) { high = mid; } else { high--; } } return nums[low]; } }

public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x) { val = x; } } public class Solution { public public TreeNode upsideDownBinaryTree(TreeNode root) { boolean isMatch = (root == null || root.left == null); if (isMatch) { return root; } TreeNode new_root = upsideDownBinaryTree(root.left); root.left.right = root; root.left.left = root.right; root.left = null; root.right = null; return new_root; } }

public class Solution { public boolean isOneEditDistance(String s, String t) { int rowCount = s.length(); int colCount = t.length(); if (rowCount > colCount) { return isOneEditDistance(t, s); } if (colCount - rowCount > 1) { return false; } for (int i = 0; i < rowCount; ++i) { if (s.charAt(i) != t.charAt(i)) { if (rowCount < colCount) { return s.substring(i).equals(t.substring(i + 1)); } else { return s.substring(i + 1).equals(t.substring(i + 1)); } } } return rowCount + 1 == colCount; } }

public class Solution { public int findPeakElement(int[] nums) { int left = 0, right = nums.length - 1; while (left < right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (nums[mid] < nums[left + (right - left) / 2 + 1]) { left = mid + 1; } else { right = mid; } } return left; } }

public class Solution { public int compareVersion(String version1, String version2) { int i = 0, j = 0; boolean isWithinRange = true; while (isWithinRange) { int num1 = 0, num2 = 0; if (i < version1.length() && version1.charAt(i) != '.') { num1 = num1 * 10 + (version1.charAt(i++) - '0'); } if (j < version2.length() && version2.charAt(j) != '.') { num2 = num2 * 10 + (version2.charAt(j++) - '0'); } isWithinRange = i < version1.length() || j < version2.length(); if (num1 < num2) return -1; if (num1 > num2) return 1; } return 0; } }

public class Solution { public int rob(int[] nums) { return Arrays.stream(nums) .reduce(0, (prev2, num) -> Math.max(prev2 + num, prev1), Integer::max); } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.List; import java.util.Queue; public class Solution { public boolean canFinish(int numCourses, int[][] prerequisites) { List> adj = new ArrayList<>(numCourses); int[] inDegree = new int[numCourses]; for (int i = 0; i < numCourses; i++) adj.add(new ArrayList<>()); // Build the adjacency list and calculate in-degrees for (int[] p : prerequisites) { adj.get(p[1]).add(p[0]); inDegree[p[0]]++; } Queue q = new LinkedList<>(); // Enqueue all nodes with zero in-degree for (int i = 0; i < numCourses; i++) { if (inDegree[i] == 0) q.add(i); } int completedCourses = 0; // Process the queue to reduce in-degrees and enqueue new nodes with zero in-degree while (!q.isEmpty()) { int currCourse = q.poll(); completedCourses++; for (int nextCourse : adj.get(currCourse)) { inDegree[nextCourse]--; if (inDegree[nextCourse] == 0) q.add(nextCourse); } } // Check if all courses are completed return completedCourses == numCourses; } }

public class Solution { public int minSubArrayLen(int target, int[] nums) { return computeMinSubArrayLen(target, nums); } private int computeMinSubArrayLen(int target, int[] nums) { int left = 0, cur_sum = 0, min_len = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int right = 0; right < nums.length; right++) { cur_sum += nums[right]; while (cur_sum >= target) { min_len = Math.min(min_len, right - left + 1); cur_sum -= nums[left++]; } } return min_len == Integer.MAX_VALUE ? 0 : min_len; } }

public class Solution { public boolean containsNearbyDuplicate(int[] nums, int k) { HashMap valueIndexMap = new HashMap<>(); for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { if (valueIndexMap.containsKey(nums[i])) { int lastIndex = valueIndexMap.get(nums[i]); boolean isWithinRange = Math.abs(i - lastIndex) <= k; if (isWithinRange) { return true; } } valueIndexMap.put(nums[i], i); } return false; } }

import java.util.TreeSet; public class Solution { public boolean containsNearbyAlmostDuplicate(int[] nums, int k, int t) { return computeContainsNearbyAlmostDuplicate(nums, k, t); } private boolean computeContainsNearbyAlmostDuplicate(int[] nums, int k, int t) { TreeSet window = new TreeSet<>(); for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { if (i > k) { window.remove((long) nums[i - k - 1]); } Long ceil = window.ceiling((long) nums[i] - t); if (ceil != null && ceil - nums[i] <= t) { return true; } window.add((long) nums[i]); } return false; } }

public class TreeNode { int value; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x) { value = x; } } public class Solution { public public TreeNode invertTree(TreeNode root) { if (root == null) { return null; } TreeNode temporary = root.left; root.left = invertTree(root.right); root.right = invertTree(temporary); return root; } }

public class Solution { public int countDigitOne(int n) { return computeCountDigitOne(n, 1); } private int computeCountDigitOne(long n, long i) { if (n < i) return 0; long divider = i * 10; return (int)((n / divider) * i + Math.min(Math.max(n % divider - i + 1, 0), i)) + computeCountDigitOne(n, i * 10); } }

public class Solution { public int shortestDistance(String[] wordsDict, String word1, String word2) { return computeShortestDistance(wordsDict, word1, word2); } private int computeShortestDistance(String[] wordsDict, String word1, String word2) { int idx1 = -1, idx2 = -1, minDistance = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int i = 0; i < wordsDict.length; i++) { if (word1.equals(wordsDict[i])) idx1 = i; if (word2.equals(wordsDict[i])) idx2 = i; if (idx1 != -1 && idx2 != -1) minDistance = Math.min(minDistance, Math.abs(idx1 - idx2)); } return minDistance; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List> getFactors(int n) { List> result = new ArrayList<>(); helper(n, 2, new ArrayList<>(), result); return result; } private void helper(int n, int start, List path, List> result) { if (n == 1 && path.size() > 1) { result.add(new ArrayList<>(path)); return; } for (int i = start; i <= n; i++) { if (n % i != 0) continue; path.add(i); helper(n / i, i, path, result); path.remove(path.size() - 1); } } }

llm_calls.raw_response: public class Solution { public int jump(int[] nums) { return computeJump(nums, 0, 0); } private int computeJump(int[] nums, int jumps, int currentEnd) { int currentFarthest = 0; for (int i = 0; i < nums.length - 1 && i <= currentEnd; i++) { currentFarthest = Math.max(currentFarthest, i + nums[i]); if (i == currentEnd) { jumps++; currentEnd = currentFarthest; } } return jumps; } }

public class Solution { public int uniquePathsWithObstacles(int[][] grid) { int m = grid.length; int n = grid[0].length; if (grid[0][0] == 1 || grid[m - 1][n - 1] == 1) return 0; for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j) { if (grid[i][j] == 1) continue; if (i > 0 || j > 0) grid[i][j] += (i > 0 ? grid[i - 1][j] : 0) + (j > 0 ? grid[i][j - 1] : 0); } return grid[m - 1][n - 1]; } }

public class Solution { public boolean search(int[] nums, int target) { if (nums.length == 0) return false; int left = 0, right = nums.length - 1; while (left <= right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (nums[mid] == target) return true; if (nums[left] == nums[mid]) { left++; continue; } if (nums[mid] > nums[left]) { if (!(nums[left] <= target && target < nums[mid])) { left = mid + 1; continue; } } else { if (!(nums[mid] < target && target <= nums[right])) { right = mid - 1; continue; } } return false; // This line should never be reached } return false; } }

public class Solution { public boolean isScramble(String s1, String s2) { if (s1.equals(s2)) return true; char[] chars = s1.toCharArray(); Arrays.sort(chars); String sortedS1 = new String(chars); chars = s2.toCharArray(); Arrays.sort(chars); String sortedS2 = new String(chars); if (!sortedS1.equals(sortedS2)) return false; for (int i = 1; i < s1.length(); i++) { if (isScramble(s1.substring(0, i), s2.substring(0, i)) && isScramble(s1.substring(i), s2.substring(i))) return true; if (isScramble(s1.substring(0, i), s2.substring(s2.length() - i)) && isScramble(s1.substring(i), s2.substring(0, s2.length() - i))) return true; } return false; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List grayCode(int n) { return computeGrayCode(n); } private List computeGrayCode(int n) { List result = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < (1 << n); i++) { result.add(i ^ (i >> 1)); } return result; } }

public class Solution { public boolean isInterleave(String s1, String s2, String s3) { int m = s1.length(), n = s2.length(); if (m + n != s3.length()) return false; boolean[][] dp = new boolean[m + 1][n + 1]; dp[0][0] = true; for (int i = 0; i <= m; i++) { for (int j = 0; j <= n; j++) { if (i == 0 && j == 0) continue; boolean fromTop = i > 0 ? dp[i - 1][j] && s1.charAt(i - 1) == s3.charAt(i + j - 1) : false; boolean fromLeft = j > 0 ? dp[i][j - 1] && s2.charAt(j - 1) == s3.charAt(i + j - 1) : false; dp[i][j] = fromTop || fromLeft; } } return dp[m][n]; } }

public class Solution { void inorder(TreeNode node, TreeNode[] nodes) { if (node == null) return; inorder(node.left, nodes); if (nodes[1] != null && nodes[1].val > node.val) { if (nodes[0] == null) nodes[0] = nodes[1]; nodes[2] = node; } nodes[1] = node; inorder(node.right, nodes); } public void recoverTree(TreeNode root) { TreeNode[] nodes = new TreeNode[3]; inorder(root, nodes); if (nodes[0] == null || nodes[2] == null) return; int temp = nodes[0].val; nodes[0].val = nodes[2].val; nodes[2].val = temp; } }

public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; } public class Solution { public boolean isSameTree(TreeNode p, TreeNode q) { boolean isMatch = (p == null && q == null); if (isMatch) { return true; } if (p == null || q == null) { return false; } if (p.val != q.val) { return false; } return isSameTree(p.left, q.left) && isSameTree(p.right, q.right); } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.List; import java.util.Queue; public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x) { val = x; } } public class Solution { public List> levelOrderBottom(TreeNode root) { List> result = new ArrayList<>(); if (root == null) return result; Queue queue = new LinkedList<>(); queue.add(root); while (!queue.isEmpty()) { int size = queue.size(); List currentLevel = new ArrayList<>(); for (int i = 0; i < size; i++) { TreeNode node = queue.poll(); currentLevel.add(node.val); if (node.left != null) queue.add(node.left); if (node.right != null) queue.add(node.right); } result.add(0, currentLevel); // Add the level to the front } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int minDepth(TreeNode root) { if (root == null) return 0; return computeMinDepth(root); } private int computeMinDepth(TreeNode node) { if (node == null) return 0; int left = computeMinDepth(node.left); int right = computeMinDepth(node.right); return (left == 0 || right == 0) ? left + right + 1 : Math.min(left, right) + 1; } }

public class Solution { public int maxProfit(int[] prices) { return computeMaxProfit(prices); } private int computeMaxProfit(int[] prices) { int max_profit = 0; for (int i = 1; i < prices.length; i++) { if (prices[i] > prices[i - 1]) { max_profit += prices[i] - prices[i - 1]; } } return max_profit; } }

import java.util.*; public class Solution { public List> findLadders(String beginWord, String endWord, List wordList) { Set dict = new HashSet<>(wordList); if (!dict.contains(endWord)) { return Collections.emptyList(); } Map> adjacent = new HashMap<>(); Map distance = new HashMap<>(); Queue queue = new LinkedList<>(); queue.offer(beginWord); distance.put(beginWord, 0); while (!queue.isEmpty()) { String current = queue.poll(); if (current.equals(endWord)) { break; } for (String neighbor : neighbors(current)) { if (!dict.contains(neighbor) || distance.containsKey(neighbor)) { continue; } distance.put(neighbor, distance.get(current) + 1); adjacent.computeIfAbsent(current, k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(neighbor); queue.offer(neighbor); } } List> result = new ArrayList<>(); List path = new ArrayList<>(); path.add(beginWord); backtrack(beginWord, endWord, path, adjacent, result); return result; } private void backtrack(String current, String endWord, List path, Map> adjacent, List> result) { if (current.equals(endWord)) { result.add(new ArrayList<>(path)); return; } for (String next : adjacent.getOrDefault(current, Collections.emptyList())) { path.add(next); backtrack(next, endWord, path, adjacent, result); path.remove(path.size() - 1); } } private List neighbors(String word) { List result = new ArrayList<>(); char[] chars = word.toCharArray(); for (int i = 0; i < chars.length; i++) { char original = chars[i]; for (char j = 'a'; j <= 'z'; j++) { if (j == original) { continue; } chars[i] = j; result.add(new String(chars)); } chars[i] = original; } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int minCut(String s) { int n = s.length(); int[] dp = new int[n + 1]; boolean[][] isPalindrome = new boolean[n][n]; for (int i=0; i <= n; i++) { dp[i] = i - 1; } for (int j=1; j < n; j++) { for (int i=j; i >= 0; i--) { boolean isMatch = s.charAt(i) == s.charAt(j) && (j - i < 2 || isPalindrome[i + 1][j - 1]); if (isMatch) { isPalindrome[i][j] = true; dp[j + 1] = Math.min(dp[j + 1], dp[i] + 1); } } } return dp[n]; } }

public class ListNode { int val; ListNode next; } public class Solution { public public ListNode detectCycle(ListNode head) { ListNode slow = head, fast = head; boolean isMatch = (fast != null && fast.next != null); while (isMatch) { slow = slow.next; fast = fast.next.next; if (slow == fast) { ListNode start = head; while (start != slow) { start = start.next; slow = slow.next; } return start; } isMatch = (fast != null && fast.next != null); } return null; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; import java.util.Stack; public class TreeNode { int value; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x) { value = x; } } public class Solution { public List postorderTraversal(TreeNode root) { List result = new ArrayList<>(); Stack s = new Stack<>(); if (root == null) return result; s.push(root); while (!s.isEmpty()) { TreeNode current = s.pop(); result.add(0, current.value); if (current.left != null) s.push(current.left); if (current.right != null) s.push(current.right); } return result; } }

class ListNode { int val; ListNode next; } public class Solution { public ListNode insertionSortList(ListNode head) { ListNode dummy = new ListNode(0); ListNode cur; while (head != null) { // Find the correct position to insert 'head' findInsertionPosition(dummy, head); // Move to the next node head = head.next; } return dummy.next; } private void findInsertionPosition(ListNode dummy, ListNode target) { ListNode cur = dummy; while (cur.next != null && cur.next.val < target.val) { cur = cur.next; } // Insert 'target' into the correct position insertNode(cur, target); } private void insertNode(ListNode prev, ListNode nodeToInsert) { ListNode temp = prev.next; prev.next = nodeToInsert; nodeToInsert.next = temp; } }

public class ListNode { int val; ListNode next; ListNode(int x) { val = x; } } public class Solution { public public ListNode sortList(ListNode head) { boolean isMatch = (head == null || head.next == null); if (isMatch) return head; ListNode slow = head, fast = head.next; while (fast != null && fast.next != null) { slow = slow.next; fast = fast.next.next; } ListNode mid = slow.next; slow.next = null; return merge(sortList(head), sortList(mid)); } private ListNode merge(ListNode left, ListNode right) { if (left == null) return right; if (right == null) return left; if (left.val < right.val) { left.next = merge(left.next, right); return left; } else { right.next = merge(left, right.next); return right; } } }

public class Solution { public int maxProduct(int[] nums) { int firstElement = nums[0]; int max_so_far = firstElement; int min_so_far = firstElement; int result = firstElement; for (int i = 1; i < nums.length; i++) { if (nums[i] < 0) { int temp = max_so_far; max_so_far = min_so_far; min_so_far = temp; } max_so_far = Math.max(nums[i], max_so_far * nums[i]); min_so_far = Math.min(nums[i], min_so_far * nums[i]); result = Math.max(result, max_so_far); } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int findMin(int[] nums) { int left = 0, right = nums.length - 1; while (left < right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (nums[left + (right - left) / 2] > nums[right]) { left = mid + 1; } else { right = mid; } } return nums[left]; } }

public class Solution { public int findMin(int[] nums) { int low = 0, high = nums.length - 1; while (low < high) { int mid = low + (high - low) / 2; if (nums[low + (high - low) / 2] > nums[high]) { low = mid + 1; } else if (nums[low + (high - low) / 2] < nums[high]) { high = mid; } else { high--; } } return nums[low]; } }

public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x) { val = x; } } public class Solution { public public TreeNode upsideDownBinaryTree(TreeNode root) { boolean isMatch = (root == null || root.left == null); if (isMatch) { return root; } TreeNode new_root = upsideDownBinaryTree(root.left); root.left.right = root; root.left.left = root.right; root.left = null; root.right = null; return new_root; } }

public class Solution { public boolean isOneEditDistance(String s, String t) { int rowCount = s.length(); int colCount = t.length(); if (rowCount > colCount) { return isOneEditDistance(t, s); } if (colCount - rowCount > 1) { return false; } for (int i = 0; i < rowCount; ++i) { if (s.charAt(i) != t.charAt(i)) { if (rowCount < colCount) { return s.substring(i).equals(t.substring(i + 1)); } else { return s.substring(i + 1).equals(t.substring(i + 1)); } } } return rowCount + 1 == colCount; } }

public class Solution { public int findPeakElement(int[] nums) { int left = 0, right = nums.length - 1; while (left < right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (nums[mid] < nums[left + (right - left) / 2 + 1]) { left = mid + 1; } else { right = mid; } } return left; } }

public class Solution { public int compareVersion(String version1, String version2) { int i = 0, j = 0; boolean isWithinRange = true; while (isWithinRange) { int num1 = 0, num2 = 0; if (i < version1.length() && version1.charAt(i) != '.') { num1 = num1 * 10 + (version1.charAt(i++) - '0'); } if (j < version2.length() && version2.charAt(j) != '.') { num2 = num2 * 10 + (version2.charAt(j++) - '0'); } isWithinRange = i < version1.length() || j < version2.length(); if (num1 < num2) return -1; if (num1 > num2) return 1; } return 0; } }

import java.util.List; import java.util.stream.Collectors; public class Solution { public int majorityElement(int[] nums) { List candidates = nums.stream() .map(num -> num) .filter(candidate -> candidate == nums[0]) .collect(Collectors.toList()); return candidates.get(0); } }
public class Solution { public int trailingZeroes(int n) { int zeroCount = 0; while (n > 0) { n = n / 5; zeroCount += n; } return zeroCount; } }
public class Solution { public int rob(int[] nums) { return Arrays.stream(nums) .reduce(0, (prev2, num) -> Math.max(prev2 + num, prev1), Integer::max); } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.List; import java.util.Queue; public class Solution { public boolean canFinish(int numCourses, int[][] prerequisites) { List> adj = new ArrayList<>(numCourses); int[] inDegree = new int[numCourses]; for (int i = 0; i < numCourses; i++) adj.add(new ArrayList<>()); // Build the adjacency list and calculate in-degrees for (int[] p : prerequisites) { adj.get(p[1]).add(p[0]); inDegree[p[0]]++; } Queue q = new LinkedList<>(); // Enqueue all nodes with zero in-degree for (int i = 0; i < numCourses; i++) { if (inDegree[i] == 0) q.add(i); } int completedCourses = 0; // Process the queue to reduce in-degrees and enqueue new nodes with zero in-degree while (!q.isEmpty()) { int currCourse = q.poll(); completedCourses++; for (int nextCourse : adj.get(currCourse)) { inDegree[nextCourse]--; if (inDegree[nextCourse] == 0) q.add(nextCourse); } } // Check if all courses are completed return completedCourses == numCourses; } }

public class Solution { public int minSubArrayLen(int target, int[] nums) { return computeMinSubArrayLen(target, nums); } private int computeMinSubArrayLen(int target, int[] nums) { int left = 0, cur_sum = 0, min_len = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int right = 0; right < nums.length; right++) { cur_sum += nums[right]; while (cur_sum >= target) { min_len = Math.min(min_len, right - left + 1); cur_sum -= nums[left++]; } } return min_len == Integer.MAX_VALUE ? 0 : min_len; } }

public class Solution { public boolean containsNearbyDuplicate(int[] nums, int k) { HashMap valueIndexMap = new HashMap<>(); for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { if (valueIndexMap.containsKey(nums[i])) { int lastIndex = valueIndexMap.get(nums[i]); boolean isWithinRange = Math.abs(i - lastIndex) <= k; if (isWithinRange) { return true; } } valueIndexMap.put(nums[i], i); } return false; } }

import java.util.TreeSet; public class Solution { public boolean containsNearbyAlmostDuplicate(int[] nums, int k, int t) { return computeContainsNearbyAlmostDuplicate(nums, k, t); } private boolean computeContainsNearbyAlmostDuplicate(int[] nums, int k, int t) { TreeSet window = new TreeSet<>(); for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { if (i > k) { window.remove((long) nums[i - k - 1]); } Long ceil = window.ceiling((long) nums[i] - t); if (ceil != null && ceil - nums[i] <= t) { return true; } window.add((long) nums[i]); } return false; } }

public class TreeNode { int value; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x) { value = x; } } public class Solution { public public TreeNode invertTree(TreeNode root) { if (root == null) { return null; } TreeNode temporary = root.left; root.left = invertTree(root.right); root.right = invertTree(temporary); return root; } }

public class Solution { public int countDigitOne(int n) { return computeCountDigitOne(n, 1); } private int computeCountDigitOne(long n, long i) { if (n < i) return 0; long divider = i * 10; return (int)((n / divider) * i + Math.min(Math.max(n % divider - i + 1, 0), i)) + computeCountDigitOne(n, i * 10); } }
public class Solution { public void deleteNode(ListNode node) { ListNode nextNode = node.next; node.value = nextNode.value; node.next = nextNode.next; } }

public class Solution { public int shortestDistance(String[] wordsDict, String word1, String word2) { return computeShortestDistance(wordsDict, word1, word2); } private int computeShortestDistance(String[] wordsDict, String word1, String word2) { int idx1 = -1, idx2 = -1, minDistance = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int i = 0; i < wordsDict.length; i++) { if (word1.equals(wordsDict[i])) idx1 = i; if (word2.equals(wordsDict[i])) idx2 = i; if (idx1 != -1 && idx2 != -1) minDistance = Math.min(minDistance, Math.abs(idx1 - idx2)); } return minDistance; } }

public class Solution { public boolean isStrobogrammatic(String num) { HashMap lookup = new HashMap() {{ put('0', '0'); put('1', '1'); put('6', '9'); put('8', '8'); put('9', '6'); }}; int left = 0, right = num.length() - 1; while(left <= right) { boolean isMatch = !lookup.containsKey(num.charAt(left)) || lookup.get(num.charAt(left)) != num.charAt(right); if(isMatch) { return false; } left++; right--; } return true; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List> getFactors(int n) { List> result = new ArrayList<>(); helper(n, 2, new ArrayList<>(), result); return result; } private void helper(int n, int start, List path, List> result) { if (n == 1 && path.size() > 1) { result.add(new ArrayList<>(path)); return; } for (int i = start; i <= n; i++) { if (n % i != 0) continue; path.add(i); helper(n / i, i, path, result); path.remove(path.size() - 1); } } }

entries.instruction: Extract the core logic in the canJump method into a private helper method called computeCanJump. The helper should encapsulate the main algorithmic work. Call computeCanJump from canJump and pass the necessary parameters. Return the computed result from the helper.

public class Solution { public int uniquePathsWithObstacles(int[][] grid) { int m = grid.length; int n = grid[0].length; if (grid[0][0] == 1 || grid[m - 1][n - 1] == 1) return 0; for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j) { if (grid[i][j] == 1) continue; if (i > 0 || j > 0) grid[i][j] += (i > 0 ? grid[i - 1][j] : 0) + (j > 0 ? grid[i][j - 1] : 0); } return grid[m - 1][n - 1]; } }

public class Solution { public int mySqrt(int x) { boolean isMatch = (x == 0 || x == 1); if (isMatch) return x; int start = 1, end = x, ans = 0; while (start <= end) { int mid = (start + end) / 2; if (mid * mid == x) return mid; if (mid <= x / mid) { start = mid + 1; ans = mid; } else { end = mid - 1; } } return ans; } }

public class Solution { public int minDistance(String word1, String word2) { int rowCount = word1.length(); int colCount = word2.length(); int[][] dpTable = new int[rowCount + 1][colCount + 1]; for (int i = 0; i <= rowCount; i++) { for (int j = 0; j <= colCount; j++) { if (i == 0) { dpTable[i][j] = j; } else if (j == 0) { dpTable[i][j] = i; } else if (word1.charAt(i - 1) == word2.charAt(j - 1)) { dpTable[i][j] = dpTable[i - 1][j - 1]; } else { dpTable[i][j] = Math.min(Math.min(dpTable[i - 1][j], dpTable[i][j - 1]), dpTable[i - 1][j - 1]) + 1; } } } return dpTable[rowCount][colCount]; } }

public class Solution { public void setZeroes(int[][] matrix) { int rows = matrix.length; int cols = matrix[0].length; if (rows == 0 || cols == 0) return; boolean firstRowHasZero = false, firstColHasZero = false; for (int i = 0; i < rows; i++) { if (matrix[i][0] == 0) { firstColHasZero = true; break; } } for (int j = 0; j < cols; j++) { if (matrix[0][j] == 0) { firstRowHasZero = true; break; } } for (int i = 1; i < rows; i++) { for (int j = 1; j < cols; j++) { if (matrix[i][j] == 0) { matrix[0][i] = 0; matrix[j][0] = 0; } } } for (int i = 1; i < rows; i++) { for (int j = 1; j < cols; j++) { if (matrix[i][0] == 0 || matrix[0][j] == 0) { matrix[i][j] = 0; } } } if (firstRowHasZero) { Arrays.fill(matrix[0], 0); } if (firstColHasZero) { for (int i = 1; i < rows; i++) { matrix[i][0] = 0; } } } }

import java.util.*; public class Solution { public List> findLadders(String beginWord, String endWord, List wordList) { Set dict = new HashSet<>(wordList); if (!dict.contains(endWord)) { return Collections.emptyList(); } Map> adjacent = new HashMap<>(); Map distance = new HashMap<>(); Queue queue = new LinkedList<>(); queue.offer(beginWord); distance.put(beginWord, 0); while (!queue.isEmpty()) { String current = queue.poll(); if (current.equals(endWord)) { break; } for (String neighbor : neighbors(current)) { if (!dict.contains(neighbor) || distance.containsKey(neighbor)) { continue; } distance.put(neighbor, distance.get(current) + 1); adjacent.computeIfAbsent(current, k -> new ArrayList<>()).add(neighbor); queue.offer(neighbor); } } List> result = new ArrayList<>(); List path = new ArrayList<>(); path.add(beginWord); backtrack(beginWord, endWord, path, adjacent, result); return result; } private void backtrack(String current, String endWord, List path, Map> adjacent, List> result) { if (current.equals(endWord)) { result.add(new ArrayList<>(path)); return; } for (String next : adjacent.getOrDefault(current, Collections.emptyList())) { path.add(next); backtrack(next, endWord, path, adjacent, result); path.remove(path.size() - 1); } } private List neighbors(String word) { List result = new ArrayList<>(); char[] chars = word.toCharArray(); for (int i = 0; i < chars.length; i++) { char original = chars[i]; for (char j = 'a'; j <= 'z'; j++) { if (j == original) { continue; } chars[i] = j; result.add(new String(chars)); } chars[i] = original; } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int minCut(String s) { int n = s.length(); int[] dp = new int[n + 1]; boolean[][] isPalindrome = new boolean[n][n]; for (int i=0; i <= n; i++) { dp[i] = i - 1; } for (int j=1; j < n; j++) { for (int i=j; i >= 0; i--) { boolean isMatch = s.charAt(i) == s.charAt(j) && (j - i < 2 || isPalindrome[i + 1][j - 1]); if (isMatch) { isPalindrome[i][j] = true; dp[j + 1] = Math.min(dp[j + 1], dp[i] + 1); } } } return dp[n]; } }

public class ListNode { int val; ListNode next; } public class Solution { public public ListNode detectCycle(ListNode head) { ListNode slow = head, fast = head; boolean isMatch = (fast != null && fast.next != null); while (isMatch) { slow = slow.next; fast = fast.next.next; if (slow == fast) { ListNode start = head; while (start != slow) { start = start.next; slow = slow.next; } return start; } isMatch = (fast != null && fast.next != null); } return null; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; import java.util.Stack; public class TreeNode { int value; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x) { value = x; } } public class Solution { public List postorderTraversal(TreeNode root) { List result = new ArrayList<>(); Stack s = new Stack<>(); if (root == null) return result; s.push(root); while (!s.isEmpty()) { TreeNode current = s.pop(); result.add(0, current.value); if (current.left != null) s.push(current.left); if (current.right != null) s.push(current.right); } return result; } }

class ListNode { int val; ListNode next; } public class Solution { public ListNode insertionSortList(ListNode head) { ListNode dummy = new ListNode(0); ListNode cur; while (head != null) { // Find the correct position to insert 'head' findInsertionPosition(dummy, head); // Move to the next node head = head.next; } return dummy.next; } private void findInsertionPosition(ListNode dummy, ListNode target) { ListNode cur = dummy; while (cur.next != null && cur.next.val < target.val) { cur = cur.next; } // Insert 'target' into the correct position insertNode(cur, target); } private void insertNode(ListNode prev, ListNode nodeToInsert) { ListNode temp = prev.next; prev.next = nodeToInsert; nodeToInsert.next = temp; } }

public class ListNode { int val; ListNode next; ListNode(int x) { val = x; } } public class Solution { public public ListNode sortList(ListNode head) { boolean isMatch = (head == null || head.next == null); if (isMatch) return head; ListNode slow = head, fast = head.next; while (fast != null && fast.next != null) { slow = slow.next; fast = fast.next.next; } ListNode mid = slow.next; slow.next = null; return merge(sortList(head), sortList(mid)); } private ListNode merge(ListNode left, ListNode right) { if (left == null) return right; if (right == null) return left; if (left.val < right.val) { left.next = merge(left.next, right); return left; } else { right.next = merge(left, right.next); return right; } } }

public class Solution { public int maxProduct(int[] nums) { int firstElement = nums[0]; int max_so_far = firstElement; int min_so_far = firstElement; int result = firstElement; for (int i = 1; i < nums.length; i++) { if (nums[i] < 0) { int temp = max_so_far; max_so_far = min_so_far; min_so_far = temp; } max_so_far = Math.max(nums[i], max_so_far * nums[i]); min_so_far = Math.min(nums[i], min_so_far * nums[i]); result = Math.max(result, max_so_far); } return result; } }

public class Solution { public int findMin(int[] nums) { int left = 0, right = nums.length - 1; while (left < right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (nums[left + (right - left) / 2] > nums[right]) { left = mid + 1; } else { right = mid; } } return nums[left]; } }

public class Solution { public int findMin(int[] nums) { int low = 0, high = nums.length - 1; while (low < high) { int mid = low + (high - low) / 2; if (nums[low + (high - low) / 2] > nums[high]) { low = mid + 1; } else if (nums[low + (high - low) / 2] < nums[high]) { high = mid; } else { high--; } } return nums[low]; } }

public class TreeNode { int val; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x) { val = x; } } public class Solution { public public TreeNode upsideDownBinaryTree(TreeNode root) { boolean isMatch = (root == null || root.left == null); if (isMatch) { return root; } TreeNode new_root = upsideDownBinaryTree(root.left); root.left.right = root; root.left.left = root.right; root.left = null; root.right = null; return new_root; } }

public class Solution { public boolean isOneEditDistance(String s, String t) { int rowCount = s.length(); int colCount = t.length(); if (rowCount > colCount) { return isOneEditDistance(t, s); } if (colCount - rowCount > 1) { return false; } for (int i = 0; i < rowCount; ++i) { if (s.charAt(i) != t.charAt(i)) { if (rowCount < colCount) { return s.substring(i).equals(t.substring(i + 1)); } else { return s.substring(i + 1).equals(t.substring(i + 1)); } } } return rowCount + 1 == colCount; } }

public class Solution { public int findPeakElement(int[] nums) { int left = 0, right = nums.length - 1; while (left < right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (nums[mid] < nums[left + (right - left) / 2 + 1]) { left = mid + 1; } else { right = mid; } } return left; } }

public class Solution { public int compareVersion(String version1, String version2) { int i = 0, j = 0; boolean isWithinRange = true; while (isWithinRange) { int num1 = 0, num2 = 0; if (i < version1.length() && version1.charAt(i) != '.') { num1 = num1 * 10 + (version1.charAt(i++) - '0'); } if (j < version2.length() && version2.charAt(j) != '.') { num2 = num2 * 10 + (version2.charAt(j++) - '0'); } isWithinRange = i < version1.length() || j < version2.length(); if (num1 < num2) return -1; if (num1 > num2) return 1; } return 0; } }

import java.util.List; import java.util.stream.Collectors; public class Solution { public int majorityElement(int[] nums) { List candidates = nums.stream() .map(num -> num) .filter(candidate -> candidate == nums[0]) .collect(Collectors.toList()); return candidates.get(0); } }
public class Solution { public int trailingZeroes(int n) { int zeroCount = 0; while (n > 0) { n = n / 5; zeroCount += n; } return zeroCount; } }
public class Solution { public int rob(int[] nums) { return Arrays.stream(nums) .reduce(0, (prev2, num) -> Math.max(prev2 + num, prev1), Integer::max); } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.List; import java.util.Queue; public class Solution { public boolean canFinish(int numCourses, int[][] prerequisites) { List> adj = new ArrayList<>(numCourses); int[] inDegree = new int[numCourses]; for (int i = 0; i < numCourses; i++) adj.add(new ArrayList<>()); // Build the adjacency list and calculate in-degrees for (int[] p : prerequisites) { adj.get(p[1]).add(p[0]); inDegree[p[0]]++; } Queue q = new LinkedList<>(); // Enqueue all nodes with zero in-degree for (int i = 0; i < numCourses; i++) { if (inDegree[i] == 0) q.add(i); } int completedCourses = 0; // Process the queue to reduce in-degrees and enqueue new nodes with zero in-degree while (!q.isEmpty()) { int currCourse = q.poll(); completedCourses++; for (int nextCourse : adj.get(currCourse)) { inDegree[nextCourse]--; if (inDegree[nextCourse] == 0) q.add(nextCourse); } } // Check if all courses are completed return completedCourses == numCourses; } }

public class Solution { public int minSubArrayLen(int target, int[] nums) { return computeMinSubArrayLen(target, nums); } private int computeMinSubArrayLen(int target, int[] nums) { int left = 0, cur_sum = 0, min_len = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int right = 0; right < nums.length; right++) { cur_sum += nums[right]; while (cur_sum >= target) { min_len = Math.min(min_len, right - left + 1); cur_sum -= nums[left++]; } } return min_len == Integer.MAX_VALUE ? 0 : min_len; } }

public class Solution { public boolean containsNearbyDuplicate(int[] nums, int k) { HashMap valueIndexMap = new HashMap<>(); for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { if (valueIndexMap.containsKey(nums[i])) { int lastIndex = valueIndexMap.get(nums[i]); boolean isWithinRange = Math.abs(i - lastIndex) <= k; if (isWithinRange) { return true; } } valueIndexMap.put(nums[i], i); } return false; } }

import java.util.TreeSet; public class Solution { public boolean containsNearbyAlmostDuplicate(int[] nums, int k, int t) { return computeContainsNearbyAlmostDuplicate(nums, k, t); } private boolean computeContainsNearbyAlmostDuplicate(int[] nums, int k, int t) { TreeSet window = new TreeSet<>(); for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { if (i > k) { window.remove((long) nums[i - k - 1]); } Long ceil = window.ceiling((long) nums[i] - t); if (ceil != null && ceil - nums[i] <= t) { return true; } window.add((long) nums[i]); } return false; } }

public class TreeNode { int value; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x) { value = x; } } public class Solution { public public TreeNode invertTree(TreeNode root) { if (root == null) { return null; } TreeNode temporary = root.left; root.left = invertTree(root.right); root.right = invertTree(temporary); return root; } }

public class Solution { public int countDigitOne(int n) { return computeCountDigitOne(n, 1); } private int computeCountDigitOne(long n, long i) { if (n < i) return 0; long divider = i * 10; return (int)((n / divider) * i + Math.min(Math.max(n % divider - i + 1, 0), i)) + computeCountDigitOne(n, i * 10); } }
public class Solution { public void deleteNode(ListNode node) { ListNode nextNode = node.next; node.value = nextNode.value; node.next = nextNode.next; } }

public class Solution { public int shortestDistance(String[] wordsDict, String word1, String word2) { return computeShortestDistance(wordsDict, word1, word2); } private int computeShortestDistance(String[] wordsDict, String word1, String word2) { int idx1 = -1, idx2 = -1, minDistance = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int i = 0; i < wordsDict.length; i++) { if (word1.equals(wordsDict[i])) idx1 = i; if (word2.equals(wordsDict[i])) idx2 = i; if (idx1 != -1 && idx2 != -1) minDistance = Math.min(minDistance, Math.abs(idx1 - idx2)); } return minDistance; } }

public class Solution { public boolean isStrobogrammatic(String num) { HashMap lookup = new HashMap() {{ put('0', '0'); put('1', '1'); put('6', '9'); put('8', '8'); put('9', '6'); }}; int left = 0, right = num.length() - 1; while(left <= right) { boolean isMatch = !lookup.containsKey(num.charAt(left)) || lookup.get(num.charAt(left)) != num.charAt(right); if(isMatch) { return false; } left++; right--; } return true; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List> getFactors(int n) { List> result = new ArrayList<>(); helper(n, 2, new ArrayList<>(), result); return result; } private void helper(int n, int start, List path, List> result) { if (n == 1 && path.size() > 1) { result.add(new ArrayList<>(path)); return; } for (int i = start; i <= n; i++) { if (n % i != 0) continue; path.add(i); helper(n / i, i, path, result); path.remove(path.size() - 1); } } }

entries.instruction: Consolidate the 4 separate loops in the uniquePathsWithObstacles method into a single pass. The current approach iterates over the same data structure multiple times. Merge the loop bodies to eliminate duplicate iteration and improve performance.

llm_calls.raw_response: public class Solution { public int uniquePathsWithObstacles(int[][] grid) { int m = grid.length; int n = grid[0].length; if (grid[0][0] == 1 || grid[m - 1][n - 1] == 1) return 0; for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j) { if (grid[i][j] == 1) continue; if (i > 0 || j > 0) grid[i][j] += (i > 0 ? grid[i - 1][j] : 0) + (j > 0 ? grid[i][j - 1] : 0); } return grid[m - 1][n - 1]; } }

public class Solution { public int mySqrt(int x) { boolean isMatch = (x == 0 || x == 1); if (isMatch) return x; int start = 1, end = x, ans = 0; while (start <= end) { int mid = (start + end) / 2; if (mid * mid == x) return mid; if (mid <= x / mid) { start = mid + 1; ans = mid; } else { end = mid - 1; } } return ans; } }

public class Solution { public int minDistance(String word1, String word2) { int rowCount = word1.length(); int colCount = word2.length(); int[][] dpTable = new int[rowCount + 1][colCount + 1]; for (int i = 0; i <= rowCount; i++) { for (int j = 0; j <= colCount; j++) { if (i == 0) { dpTable[i][j] = j; } else if (j == 0) { dpTable[i][j] = i; } else if (word1.charAt(i - 1) == word2.charAt(j - 1)) { dpTable[i][j] = dpTable[i - 1][j - 1]; } else { dpTable[i][j] = Math.min(Math.min(dpTable[i - 1][j], dpTable[i][j - 1]), dpTable[i - 1][j - 1]) + 1; } } } return dpTable[rowCount][colCount]; } }

public class Solution { public void setZeroes(int[][] matrix) { int rows = matrix.length; int cols = matrix[0].length; if (rows == 0 || cols == 0) return; boolean firstRowHasZero = false, firstColHasZero = false; for (int i = 0; i < rows; i++) { if (matrix[i][0] == 0) { firstColHasZero = true; break; } } for (int j = 0; j < cols; j++) { if (matrix[0][j] == 0) { firstRowHasZero = true; break; } } for (int i = 1; i < rows; i++) { for (int j = 1; j < cols; j++) { if (matrix[i][j] == 0) { matrix[0][i] = 0; matrix[j][0] = 0; } } } for (int i = 1; i < rows; i++) { for (int j = 1; j < cols; j++) { if (matrix[i][0] == 0 || matrix[0][j] == 0) { matrix[i][j] = 0; } } } if (firstRowHasZero) { Arrays.fill(matrix[0], 0); } if (firstColHasZero) { for (int i = 1; i < rows; i++) { matrix[i][0] = 0; } } } }

public class Solution { public void sortColors(int[] nums) { int red = 0, white = 0, blue = nums.length - 1; while (white <= blue) { int currentColor = nums[white]; if (currentColor == 0) { int temp = nums[red]; nums[red++] = currentColor; nums[white++] = temp; } else if (currentColor == 1) { white++; } else { int temp = nums[white]; nums[white] = nums[blue]; nums[blue--] = temp; } } } }

public class Solution { public boolean search(int[] nums, int target) { if (nums.length == 0) return false; int left = 0, right = nums.length - 1; while (left <= right) { int mid = left + (right - left) / 2; if (nums[mid] == target) return true; if (nums[left] == nums[mid]) { left++; continue; } if (nums[mid] > nums[left]) { if (!(nums[left] <= target && target < nums[mid])) { left = mid + 1; continue; } } else { if (!(nums[mid] < target && target <= nums[right])) { right = mid - 1; continue; } } return false; // This line should never be reached } return false; } }

public class Solution { public boolean isScramble(String s1, String s2) { if (s1.equals(s2)) return true; char[] chars = s1.toCharArray(); Arrays.sort(chars); String sortedS1 = new String(chars); chars = s2.toCharArray(); Arrays.sort(chars); String sortedS2 = new String(chars); if (!sortedS1.equals(sortedS2)) return false; for (int i = 1; i < s1.length(); i++) { if (isScramble(s1.substring(0, i), s2.substring(0, i)) && isScramble(s1.substring(i), s2.substring(i))) return true; if (isScramble(s1.substring(0, i), s2.substring(s2.length() - i)) && isScramble(s1.substring(i), s2.substring(0, s2.length() - i))) return true; } return false; } }

public class Solution { public int maxProduct(int[] nums) { int firstElement = nums[0]; int max_so_far = firstElement; int min_so_far = firstElement; int result = firstElement; for (int i = 1; i < nums.length; i++) { if (nums[i] < 0) { int temp = max_so_far; max_so_far = min_so_far; min_so_far = temp; } max_so_far = Math.max(nums[i], max_so_far * nums[i]); min_so_far = Math.min(nums[i], min_so_far * nums[i]); result = Math.max(result, max_so_far); } return result; } }

public class Solution { public boolean isOneEditDistance(String s, String t) { int rowCount = s.length(); int colCount = t.length(); if (rowCount > colCount) { return isOneEditDistance(t, s); } if (colCount - rowCount > 1) { return false; } for (int i = 0; i < rowCount; ++i) { if (s.charAt(i) != t.charAt(i)) { if (rowCount < colCount) { return s.substring(i).equals(t.substring(i + 1)); } else { return s.substring(i + 1).equals(t.substring(i + 1)); } } } return rowCount + 1 == colCount; } }

public class Solution { public int compareVersion(String version1, String version2) { int i = 0, j = 0; boolean isWithinRange = true; while (isWithinRange) { int num1 = 0, num2 = 0; if (i < version1.length() && version1.charAt(i) != '.') { num1 = num1 * 10 + (version1.charAt(i++) - '0'); } if (j < version2.length() && version2.charAt(j) != '.') { num2 = num2 * 10 + (version2.charAt(j++) - '0'); } isWithinRange = i < version1.length() || j < version2.length(); if (num1 < num2) return -1; if (num1 > num2) return 1; } return 0; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.LinkedList; import java.util.List; import java.util.Queue; public class Solution { public boolean canFinish(int numCourses, int[][] prerequisites) { List> adj = new ArrayList<>(numCourses); int[] inDegree = new int[numCourses]; for (int i = 0; i < numCourses; i++) adj.add(new ArrayList<>()); // Build the adjacency list and calculate in-degrees for (int[] p : prerequisites) { adj.get(p[1]).add(p[0]); inDegree[p[0]]++; } Queue q = new LinkedList<>(); // Enqueue all nodes with zero in-degree for (int i = 0; i < numCourses; i++) { if (inDegree[i] == 0) q.add(i); } int completedCourses = 0; // Process the queue to reduce in-degrees and enqueue new nodes with zero in-degree while (!q.isEmpty()) { int currCourse = q.poll(); completedCourses++; for (int nextCourse : adj.get(currCourse)) { inDegree[nextCourse]--; if (inDegree[nextCourse] == 0) q.add(nextCourse); } } // Check if all courses are completed return completedCourses == numCourses; } }

public class Solution { public int minSubArrayLen(int target, int[] nums) { return computeMinSubArrayLen(target, nums); } private int computeMinSubArrayLen(int target, int[] nums) { int left = 0, cur_sum = 0, min_len = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int right = 0; right < nums.length; right++) { cur_sum += nums[right]; while (cur_sum >= target) { min_len = Math.min(min_len, right - left + 1); cur_sum -= nums[left++]; } } return min_len == Integer.MAX_VALUE ? 0 : min_len; } }

public class Solution { public boolean containsNearbyDuplicate(int[] nums, int k) { HashMap valueIndexMap = new HashMap<>(); for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { if (valueIndexMap.containsKey(nums[i])) { int lastIndex = valueIndexMap.get(nums[i]); boolean isWithinRange = Math.abs(i - lastIndex) <= k; if (isWithinRange) { return true; } } valueIndexMap.put(nums[i], i); } return false; } }

import java.util.TreeSet; public class Solution { public boolean containsNearbyAlmostDuplicate(int[] nums, int k, int t) { return computeContainsNearbyAlmostDuplicate(nums, k, t); } private boolean computeContainsNearbyAlmostDuplicate(int[] nums, int k, int t) { TreeSet window = new TreeSet<>(); for (int i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) { if (i > k) { window.remove((long) nums[i - k - 1]); } Long ceil = window.ceiling((long) nums[i] - t); if (ceil != null && ceil - nums[i] <= t) { return true; } window.add((long) nums[i]); } return false; } }

public class TreeNode { int value; TreeNode left; TreeNode right; TreeNode(int x) { value = x; } } public class Solution { public public TreeNode invertTree(TreeNode root) { if (root == null) { return null; } TreeNode temporary = root.left; root.left = invertTree(root.right); root.right = invertTree(temporary); return root; } }

public class Solution { public int countDigitOne(int n) { return computeCountDigitOne(n, 1); } private int computeCountDigitOne(long n, long i) { if (n < i) return 0; long divider = i * 10; return (int)((n / divider) * i + Math.min(Math.max(n % divider - i + 1, 0), i)) + computeCountDigitOne(n, i * 10); } }

public class Solution { public int shortestDistance(String[] wordsDict, String word1, String word2) { return computeShortestDistance(wordsDict, word1, word2); } private int computeShortestDistance(String[] wordsDict, String word1, String word2) { int idx1 = -1, idx2 = -1, minDistance = Integer.MAX_VALUE; for (int i = 0; i < wordsDict.length; i++) { if (word1.equals(wordsDict[i])) idx1 = i; if (word2.equals(wordsDict[i])) idx2 = i; if (idx1 != -1 && idx2 != -1) minDistance = Math.min(minDistance, Math.abs(idx1 - idx2)); } return minDistance; } }

import java.util.ArrayList; import java.util.List; public class Solution { public List> getFactors(int n) { List> result = new ArrayList<>(); helper(n, 2, new ArrayList<>(), result); return result; } private void helper(int n, int start, List path, List> result) { if (n == 1 && path.size() > 1) { result.add(new ArrayList<>(path)); return; } for (int i = start; i <= n; i++) { if (n % i != 0) continue; path.add(i); helper(n / i, i, path, result); path.remove(path.size() - 1); } } }
